match_type: How many Scene icons have the same type as the Reference?
How many icons in the Scene panel have the same type as the Reference?
Count the Scene icons whose type matches the Reference.
What is the number of Scene icons with the same type as the Reference?
How many Scene icons match the Reference type?
match_color: How many Scene icons have the same color as the Reference?
How many icons in the Scene panel have the same color as the Reference?
Count the Scene icons whose color matches the Reference.
What is the number of Scene icons with the same color as the Reference?
How many Scene icons match the Reference color?
match_rotation: How many Scene icons have the same rotation as the Reference?
How many icons in the Scene panel have the same rotation as the Reference?
Count the Scene icons whose rotation matches the Reference.
What is the number of Scene icons with the same rotation as the Reference?
How many Scene icons match the Reference rotation?
match_type_color_rotation: How many Scene icons match the Reference in type, color, and rotation?
How many icons in the Scene panel have the same type, color, and rotation as the Reference?
Count the Scene icons that match the Reference type, color, and rotation.
What is the number of Scene icons matching the Reference in all three attributes: type, color, and rotation?
How many Scene icons exactly match the Reference type, color, and rotation?
size_smaller: How many Scene icons are smaller than the Reference?
How many icons in the Scene panel are smaller than the Reference?
Count the Scene icons whose size is smaller than the Reference.
What is the number of Scene icons smaller than the Reference?
How many Scene icons have a smaller size than the Reference?
size_larger: How many Scene icons are larger than the Reference?
How many icons in the Scene panel are larger than the Reference?
Count the Scene icons whose size is larger than the Reference.
What is the number of Scene icons larger than the Reference?
How many Scene icons have a larger size than the Reference?
left_of_anchor: How many Scene icons match the Reference type and are to the left of the Anchor?
How many icons in the Scene panel match the Reference type and lie left of the Anchor?
Count the Scene icons with the Reference type that are left of the Anchor.
What is the number of Reference-type Scene icons to the left of the Anchor?
How many Scene icons of the Reference type are positioned left of the Anchor?
right_of_anchor: How many Scene icons match the Reference type and are to the right of the Anchor?
How many icons in the Scene panel match the Reference type and lie right of the Anchor?
Count the Scene icons with the Reference type that are right of the Anchor.
What is the number of Reference-type Scene icons to the right of the Anchor?
How many Scene icons of the Reference type are positioned right of the Anchor?
above_anchor: How many Scene icons match the Reference type and are above the Anchor?
How many icons in the Scene panel match the Reference type and lie above the Anchor?
Count the Scene icons with the Reference type that are above the Anchor.
What is the number of Reference-type Scene icons above the Anchor?
How many Scene icons of the Reference type are positioned above the Anchor?
below_anchor: How many Scene icons match the Reference type and are below the Anchor?
How many icons in the Scene panel match the Reference type and lie below the Anchor?
Count the Scene icons with the Reference type that are below the Anchor.
What is the number of Reference-type Scene icons below the Anchor?
How many Scene icons of the Reference type are positioned below the Anchor?

global.answer_hint: set "answer" to the count as an integer
